name: io.github.ancilis/heel
description: Agent-native abuse-simulation: rehearse how a customer could abuse your product before it ships. Probes a product you own, proves an abuse path is reachable with a contained PoC, and returns a ranked report. Exposes only consumption/execution tools — never scope mutation (scopes are human-only, out-of-band, signed).

environment_variables.name: HEEL_HOME
environment_variables.description: Data directory for signed authorization scopes, the SQLite store, and the tamper-evident containment log (default ./.heel).

environment_variables.name: HEEL_SIGNING_KEY
environment_variables.description: Path to the HMAC signing key. For production, set this OUTSIDE HEEL_HOME (key/data separation).

environment_variables.name: HEEL_MODEL
environment_variables.description: Set to 'anthropic' to enable the optional LLM control loop (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Defaults to the deterministic offline model.
